topics: Dynamic response of first order liquid level system and RC circuit
Response Characteristics and V-I Characteristics of LDR
Measurement of level using Capacitive transducers
Vibration measurement using Piezoelectric transducers, Measurement of Speed, and IR Range sensor
Calibration of DC ammeter, voltmeter and wattmeter
Measurement of resistance using DC bridges
Characteristics of Strain gauge and load cell
Use of universal LCR Bridge and digital LCR meter for measurement of inductance, capacitance and resistance
Characteristics of displacement sensor (RVDT and LVDT) and measurement of unknown linear and rotary displacement
Characteristics (loading and unloading) of Temperature Sensors (RTD, Thermocouple, Thermistor) and comparison of different sensors
Familiarisation of Virtual Instrumentation software (e.g., LabVIEW): Loops and charts, Case and sequence structures
